mustHaves.summary: Marketer creates a short code -> destination URL mapping
Per-code click count visible to the marketer

notes: perf-envelope REQUIRED: §8 names a concrete envelope (p99 < 50ms at 1,000 req/s, 0 errors) — a correct run also lifts this into nfrs[] (category performance) for a gated enforcement bead. abuse-surface required: public redirect endpoint. authn required: a marketer authenticates to the internal creation page. authz EXCLUDED: a single trusted internal marketer group with no cross-user/cross-tenant data boundary stated, so the 'authn required AND >1 principal or cross-user data' condition is not met; authz is excluded-by-default and stays excluded (reason: 'single trusted internal group, no per-user data partition in v1'). This is the deliberate contrast with fixture 01, where multi-tenant workspaces force authz required. observability required: explicit production load/scale operation.
